main.description: A declaration of stance toward a lens by some party (identified by DID). Provides the minimal governance substrate: services can filter lenses by attestation, and users can see who has reviewed or deployed a given lens.

lens.description: AT-URI of the lens being attested.

stance.description: The attester's declared relationship to this lens.

scope.description: Optional scope qualifier, e.g. a service name or domain this attestation applies to.

supersedes.description: AT-URI of a previous attestation this one replaces.
